name: Law Office of Jack G. Lezman, PLLC
description_short: Charlotte-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 filings, debt relief, and creditor harassment defense with 25+ years of attorney experience.
description_long:
Law Office of Jack G. Lezman, PLLC is a bankruptcy practice located in Charlotte, North Carolina, founded by Jack G. Lezman, who brings more than 25 years of experience in bankruptcy law. The firm positions itself as a client-focused legal practice dedicated to helping individuals in financial distress navigate the bankruptcy process and explore debt relief alternatives.

The firm's primary services include Chapter 7 bankruptcy filings (liquidation bankruptcy), creditor harassment defense under the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA), wage garnishment relief, foreclosure prevention, and vehicle repossession prevention. The firm also discusses debt consolidation as an alternative to bankruptcy for clients seeking other solutions. Their website emphasizes stopping creditor calls, protecting assets, and helping clients achieve a financial fresh start through legal means.

The firm distinguishes itself through attorney Lezman's 25+ years of specific bankruptcy experience and an emphasis on personalized care for each client's unique financial situation. The website uses compassionate language about the emotional toll of debt and frames bankruptcy as a legitimate tool for financial recovery rather than a failure. They serve Charlotte and outlying counties in North Carolina.

Limitations include the firm's narrow geographic service area (Charlotte region only) and focus exclusively on bankruptcy and debt-related legal services rather than broader financial planning. The website does not provide transparent fee structures, case outcomes, or specific examples of successful results, which is common for legal services but limits informed comparison. No information is provided about client testimonials, bar association ratings, or disciplinary history.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Attorney has 25+ years of specialized bankruptcy experience
Offers Chapter 7 bankruptcy guidance with emphasis on asset protection
Provides FDCPA creditor harassment defense and education on consumer rights
Addresses multiple debt crises: wage garnishment, foreclosure, and repossession
Discusses debt consolidation as a non-bankruptcy alternative for eligible clients
Emphasizes emotional support and reframing bankruptcy as a legitimate fresh start
Serves Charlotte and surrounding counties with local physical office location
cons: No transparent pricing or fee structure disclosed on website
Limited to Charlotte, NC area — not accessible to clients outside service region
No case results, success rates, or client testimonials provided
Website contains no information on bar rating, licensing verification, or disciplinary history
No discussion of when bankruptcy is NOT appropriate or alternative strategies beyond debt consolidation
best_for: Charlotte-area residents facing heavy unsecured debt with assets they want to protect
Individuals experiencing wage garnishment, foreclosure, or repossession threats
People being harassed by debt collectors and seeking FDCPA legal recourse
Debtors wanting guidance on whether Chapter 7 or debt consolidation suits their situation
diagnosis: Best for Charlotte-area residents with substantial unsecured debt or active creditor harassment seeking legal bankruptcy representation or debt relief strategy guidance. Primary caveat: this is a bankruptcy law firm requiring direct consultation rather than a self-service platform, and services are limited to the Charlotte geographic region.
services: Chapter 13 bankruptcy consultation (mentioned in category but not detailed)
Creditor harassment defense under Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA)
Financial fresh start planning and post-bankruptcy credit re-establishment
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
